fields.name: Ledger Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the ledger entry that the payment relates to.

fields.name: Source No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the source document that the entry originates from.

fields.name: Document Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of document that the payment relates to.

fields.name: Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the document that the payment relates to.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the invoice transaction that the payment relates to.

fields.name: Due Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the payment due date on the related document.

fields.name: Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the customer or vendor that the payment relates to.

fields.name: Remaining Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount that remains to be paid on the document.

fields.name: Payment Made
fields.tooltip: Specifies if you have received or made payment for the document.

fields.name: Date Received
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the payment was made.

fields.name: Amount Received
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount that is paid in the bank account.

fields.name: Original Remaining Amount
fields.tooltip:
This field is used internally.

Specifies the amount that remains to be applied before the entry has been completely applied.
The value in this field is automatically calculated when the related document is posted. The amount is not updated when additional amounts are applied.

fields.name: Rem. Amt. after Discount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the remaining amount after the payment discount is deducted.

fields.name: Pmt. Discount Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date on which the amount in the entry must be paid for a payment discount to be granted.

fields.name: External Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies a document number that refers to the customer's or vendor's numbering system.
